bgms 0.1.6.4
  • Reference

  • Changelog

Extract Main Effect Estimates

Source: R/extractor_functions.R
extract_main_effects.Rd

Retrieves posterior mean main-effect parameters from a model fitted with bgm() or bgmCompare(). For OMRF models these are category thresholds; for mixed MRF models these include discrete thresholds and continuous means. GGM models have no main effects and return NULL.

Usage

extract_main_effects(bgms_object)

Arguments

bgms_object

A fitted model object of class bgms (from bgm()) or bgmCompare (from bgmCompare()).

Value

The structure depends on the model type:

GGM (bgms)

NULL (invisibly). GGM models have no main effects; the precision matrix diagonal is on coef(fit)$pairwise.

OMRF (bgms)

A numeric matrix with one row per variable and one column per category threshold, containing posterior means. Columns beyond the number of categories for a variable are NA.

Mixed MRF (bgms)

A list with two elements:

discrete

A numeric matrix (p rows x max_categories columns) of posterior mean thresholds for discrete variables.

continuous

A numeric matrix (q rows x 1 column) of posterior mean continuous variable means.

bgmCompare

A matrix with one row per post-warmup iteration, containing posterior samples of baseline main-effect parameters.

Details

Extract Main Effect Estimates

See also

bgm(), bgmCompare(), extract_pairwise_interactions(), extract_category_thresholds()

Other extractors: extract_arguments(), extract_category_thresholds(), extract_ess(), extract_group_params(), extract_indicator_priors(), extract_indicators(), extract_pairwise_interactions(), extract_posterior_inclusion_probabilities(), extract_rhat(), extract_sbm()

Examples

# \donttest{
fit = bgm(x = Wenchuan[, 1:3])
#> 2 rows with missing values excluded (n = 360 remaining).
#> To impute missing values instead, use na_action = "impute".
#> Chain 1 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 150/2000 (7.5%)
#> Chain 2 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 208/2000 (10.4%)
#> Chain 3 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 183/2000 (9.2%)
#> Chain 4 (Warmup): ⦗━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 159/2000 (8.0%)
#> Total   (Warmup): ⦗━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 700/8000 (8.8%)
#> Elapsed: 0s | ETA: 0s
#> Chain 1 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 500/2000 (25.0%)
#> Chain 2 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 553/2000 (27.7%)
#> Chain 3 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 529/2000 (26.5%)
#> Chain 4 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 495/2000 (24.8%)
#> Total   (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 2077/8000 (26.0%)
#> Elapsed: 1s | ETA: 3s
#> Chain 1 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 850/2000 (42.5%)
#> Chain 2 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 916/2000 (45.8%)
#> Chain 3 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 870/2000 (43.5%)
#> Chain 4 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 867/2000 (43.4%)
#> Total   (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 3503/8000 (43.8%)
#> Elapsed: 1s | ETA: 1s
#> Chain 1 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1200/2000 (60.0%)
#> Chain 2 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1278/2000 (63.9%)
#> Chain 3 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1212/2000 (60.6%)
#> Chain 4 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1210/2000 (60.5%)
#> Total   (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 4900/8000 (61.3%)
#> Elapsed: 2s | ETA: 1s
#> Chain 1 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1550/2000 (77.5%)
#> Chain 2 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1641/2000 (82.0%)
#> Chain 3 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━⦘ 1552/2000 (77.6%)
#> Chain 4 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━⦘ 1560/2000 (78.0%)
#> Total   (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 6303/8000 (78.8%)
#> Elapsed: 2s | ETA: 1s
#> Chain 1 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1900/2000 (95.0%)
#> Chain 2 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 2000/2000 (100.0%)
#> Chain 3 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1878/2000 (93.9%)
#> Chain 4 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━⦘ 1918/2000 (95.9%)
#> Total   (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━⦘ 7696/8000 (96.2%)
#> Elapsed: 3s | ETA: 0s
#> Chain 1 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 2000/2000 (100.0%)
#> Chain 2 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 2000/2000 (100.0%)

#> Total   (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 8000/8000 (100.0%)
#> Elapsed: 3s | ETA: 0s
extract_main_effects(fit)
#>                  [,1]      [,2]      [,3]       [,4]
#> intrusion  0.81077103 -1.169802 -3.520669  -7.421631
#> dreams    -0.40834340 -3.304464 -6.369120 -10.464337
#> flash      0.07065692 -2.128317 -4.577792  -8.416585
# }
